requirements: At least one contract-valid smoke fixture or public record exists for e_coli plus tetracycline.
Scope, normalization, and filtering policies are present.
Only fixture-backed smoke execution is available.
warn.next_action: continue backend and UI work, but label outputs fixture-backed

requirements: No usable smoke fixture or public record exists.

warn.notes: Use only for exploratory baselines and narrow claims.

fail.notes: Do not present training metrics for this pair.

requirements: One contrastive case or clear queue variant exists.
Only one strong fixture-backed case exists.

fallback_actions: Stay locked on the smoke pair before expanding the drug panel.
Use fixture-backed decision and UI smoke outputs when public retrieval or tooling is delayed.
Reduce the public drug panel instead of stretching into sparse labels.
Delay benchmark claims until training_readiness reaches pass.
expansion_criteria: The smoke pair runs end to end without manual data patching.
At least one additional organism-drug pair reaches training_readiness warn or better.
Filtering and split manifests are saved alongside the dataset snapshot.
